overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the interior of a food stall in a bustling outdoor market. The player starts seated at a front counter looking out at pedestrians and neon signs, then stands up and moves around the cramped interior to a side counter position, passing by another seated NPC.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall interior with counter facing market street

events.description: NPC sitting across the counter stands up and walks away toward the street

agents.ego_description: sitting at the front counter of the food stall, looking out at the bustling market street

notable_agents.action: sitting across the counter, then stands up and walks away toward the market street

entered.detail: metal counter with bottles and ashtray on top
dark bottle sitting on the counter
black ashtray on the counter surface
pink and yellow neon sign reading Pizza mounted on distant building
large cyan neon sign on building facade across the street
exposed industrial metal beams and hanging wires forming the market roof structure

segments.scene_description: The scene opens from a first-person perspective sitting at a food stall counter in a cyberpunk market. The counter holds a bottle and ashtray, while outside pedestrians walk past neon signs including a prominent Pizza sign and a large cyan TECHNOLOGY sign. An NPC sits across the counter before standing up and leaving around the 7-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow interior passage of food stall

events.description: player character stands up from counter and begins moving through the stall interior
view temporarily blocked by yellow partition wall while navigating the tight interior space

agents.ego_description: moving through the narrow interior of the food stall, navigating around counters and equipment

entered.detail: tall yellow divider wall separating sections of the stall interior
metal storage shelves with various supplies
stacked cardboard boxes on the floor

segments.scene_description: The player stands up and moves away from the front counter, navigating through the cramped interior of the food stall. The camera passes by metal shelving and cardboard boxes, with the view briefly occluded by a yellow partition wall as the player moves toward the side of the stall.

scene_state.functional_zone: side counter of food stall with view of market street

agents.ego_description: sitting at the side counter looking out at the market street from a different angle, near a blonde woman

notable_agents.action: blonde woman sitting at the side counter, looking out at the street

entered.detail: narrow counter along the side wall with magazines and items scattered on it

segments.scene_description: The player settles at a side counter position inside the stall, next to a blonde woman who is also looking out at the street. From this new angle, the same neon signs and market activity are visible through the window, while metal shelving and storage items occupy the interior space around the counter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a seated position at a food stall counter into the cramped interior of the vendor's workspace. It begins with a view of a bottle and ashtray on the counter, looking out at pedestrians and glowing neon signs, including a prominent Pizza and cyan TECHNOLOGY sign, as a seated NPC stands and departs. As the camera rises and moves away from the front counter, the perspective navigates through a narrow space filled with metal shelving and cardboard boxes, briefly passing behind a yellow partition wall. The scene then shifts toward the side of the stall, where the camera settles into a new position next to a blonde woman. From this final vantage point, the interior storage items frame a renewed view of the bustling market activity and neon lights outside.
